title: Bardwell Park railway station

infobox.value: Hartill-Law Avenue, [Bardwell Park](/wiki/Bardwell_Park "Bardwell Park") [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney"), New South Wales Australia
[Transport Asset Manager of NSW](/wiki/Transport_Asset_Manager_of_New_South_Wales "Transport Asset Manager of New South Wales")
10.10 km (6.28 mi) from [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney")
* Weekdays:   Staffed: 6am to 7pm   * Weekends and public holidays:  Unstaffed
[BPK](/wiki/List_of_New_South_Wales_railway_station_codes "List of New South Wales railway station codes")

[T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney") & the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle") via the [Airport](/wiki/International_Airport_railway_station,_Sydney "International Airport railway station, Sydney") | [[8]](#cite_note-Timetable-8)

[T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Revesby](/wiki/Revesby_railway_station "Revesby railway station") early morning & late night services to [Macarthur](/wiki/Macarthur_railway_station "Macarthur railway station") | [[8]](#cite_note-Timetable-8)

is a [suburban](/wiki/Commuter_rail "Commuter rail") [railway station](/wiki/Train_station "Train station") located on the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line"), serving the [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney") suburb of [Bardwell Park](/wiki/Bardwell_Park "Bardwell Park"). It is served by [Sydney Trains](/wiki/Sydney_Trains "Sydney Trains") [T8 Airport & South Line](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") services.
This figure is the number of entries and exits of a year combined averaged to a day.
This ranking includes all Sydney Trains, Sydney Metro, and Intercity stations. Stations with less than 50 passengers a month are not ranked.
[Bardwell Park Railway Station Group](http://www.environment.nsw.gov.au/heritageapp/ViewHeritageItemDetails.aspx?ID=4801896) NSW Environment & Heritage

**Bardwell Park railway station** is a [suburban](/wiki/Commuter_rail "Commuter rail") [railway station](/wiki/Train_station "Train station") located on the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line"), serving the [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney") suburb of [Bardwell Park](/wiki/Bardwell_Park "Bardwell Park"). It is served by [Sydney Trains](/wiki/Sydney_Trains "Sydney Trains") [T8 Airport & South Line](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") services.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bardwell_Park_railway_station&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Bardwell Park station opened on 21 September 1931 when the [East Hills line](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_line "East Hills railway line") opened from [Tempe](/wiki/Tempe_railway_station "Tempe railway station") to [East Hills](/wiki/East_Hills_railway_station "East Hills railway station").[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5) In 2000, as part of the quadruplication of the line between [Wolli Creek](/wiki/Wolli_Creek_railway_station "Wolli Creek railway station") and [Kingsgrove](/wiki/Kingsgrove_railway_station "Kingsgrove railway station"), through lines were added on either side of the existing pair.

On 22 April 2015, the station suffered significant flooding due to inclement weather, with the flood water nearly reaching the height of the platform. A [time lapse](/wiki/Time_lapse "Time lapse") video of [CCTV](/wiki/CCTV "CCTV") from the station was released publicly showing the rising flood water.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

In early 2024, Minister for Transport, Jo Haylen, announced a station upgrade for Bardwell Park station, set to be completed in 2026. The upgrade will feature a new lift, stairs and concourse, as well as extended canopies and a resurfaced platform. Work is yet to begin as of late September 2024.[[7]](#cite_note-7)

## Services

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bardwell_Park_railway_station&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Services")]

### Platforms

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bardwell_Park_railway_station&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Platforms")]

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Platform | Line | Stopping pattern | Notes |
| 1 | [T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Central](/wiki/Central_railway_station,_Sydney "Central railway station, Sydney") & the [City Circle](/wiki/City_Circle "City Circle") via the [Airport](/wiki/International_Airport_railway_station,_Sydney "International Airport railway station, Sydney") | [[8]](#cite_note-Timetable-8) |
| 2 | [T8](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line") | services to [Revesby](/wiki/Revesby_railway_station "Revesby railway station") early morning & late night services to [Macarthur](/wiki/Macarthur_railway_station "Macarthur railway station") | [[8]](#cite_note-Timetable-8) |

### Transport links

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bardwell_Park_railway_station&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Transport links")]

[Transit Systems](/wiki/Transit_Systems_NSW "Transit Systems NSW") operates two bus routes via Bardwell Park station, under [contract](/wiki/Sydney_Metropolitan_Bus_Service_Contracts "Sydney Metropolitan Bus Service Contracts") to [Transport for NSW](/wiki/Transport_for_NSW "Transport for NSW"):

Hartill-Law Ave:

* 473: [Campsie](/wiki/Campsie,_New_South_Wales "Campsie, New South Wales") to [Rockdale station](/wiki/Rockdale_railway_station "Rockdale railway station") via Clemton Park, Earlwood, Turrella and Arncliffe[[9]](#cite_note-9)
* 491: [Five Dock](/wiki/Five_Dock "Five Dock") to [Hurstville](/wiki/Hurstville "Hurstville") via Ashfield, Canterbury and Earlwood[[10]](#cite_note-10)

[U-Go Mobility](/wiki/U-Go_Mobility "U-Go Mobility") operates one bus route via Bardwell Park station, under contract to Transport for NSW:

* 446: [Roselands Shopping Centre](/wiki/Roselands_Shopping_Centre "Roselands Shopping Centre") to [Kogarah](/wiki/Kogarah "Kogarah") via Earlwood and Bexley North[[11]](#cite_note-11)
